info.name: Compliance Co-pilot — Review PRD
info.description: POST a PRD to the Compliance Co-pilot review endpoint. The user supplies their own provider API key; the server never persists it.

request.description: Returns a structured, citation-backed review of the supplied PRD. X-Provider must be 'anthropic' or 'openai'. X-API-Key is the user's key for that provider — it is never logged or persisted by the server.
